after.name: ce_worklist_pages
after.comment: Stores pages belonging to a worklist.

columns.name: cewp_page_prefixedtext
columns.comment: Full prefixed text for cross-wiki display, see T226667.

columns.name: cewp_user_id
columns.comment: Central user ID associated with the page row.

columns.name: cewp_timestamp
columns.comment: Timestamp for the worklist page row (UTC, TS_MW).

indexes.name: ce_worklist_pages_wiki_page_cew_id
indexes.comment: Unique per (wiki, page) within a worklist; the leftmost (wiki, page) columns also allow looking up which worklists a page belongs to, e.g. for the post-edit dialog.
